title: lindera angustifolia var. glabra
intro: Lindera angustifolia var. glabra, also known as the Chinese spicebush, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the Lindera angustifolia var. glabra are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be used to treat a range of ailments.
